legacy.content:
--- status: complete phase: 05-docs-fold-into-planning-and-notebook-tooling updated: 2026-02-24T04:12:58.178Z ---
## Tests
### 1. docs/ contains only image-catalog (and images). Game PRD, design decisions, and implementation roadmap folded into .planning. Notebook tooling: venv + check/install + JupyterLab from root; no single-notebook run commands. Notebooks are documentation (entities/vectors/dialogue in same space; threshold and options for follow-up). expected: docs/ contains only image-catalog (and images). Game PRD, design decisions, and implementation roadmap folded into .planning. Notebook tooling: venv + check/install + JupyterLab from root; no single-notebook run commands. Notebooks are documentation (entities/vectors/dialogue in same space; threshold and options for follow-up). result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 2. Plan 01 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. expected: Plan 01 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 3. docs/ contains only image-catalog (and images). Game PRD, design decisions, and implementation roadmap folded into .planning. Notebook tooling: venv + check/install + JupyterLab from root; no single-notebook run commands. Notebooks are documentation (entities/vectors/dialogue in same space; threshold and options for follow-up). expected: docs/ contains only image-catalog (and images). Game PRD, design decisions, and implementation roadmap folded into .planning. Notebook tooling: venv + check/install + JupyterLab from root; no single-notebook run commands. Notebooks are documentation (entities/vectors/dialogue in same space; threshold and options for follow-up). result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 4. Plan 02 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. expected: Plan 02 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
## Summary
- total: 4 - pass: 0 - issue: 0 - skipped: 4
